description: 整合全廠事件告警、KPI看板、異常升級與跨部門協調；CCC中控台是全廠可觀測性的單一入口。
description_en: Integrate fab-wide event alerting, KPI dashboards, anomaly escalation, and cross-department coordination; the CCC console is the single pane of glass for fab-wide observability.
description_zh-Hans: 整合全厂事件告警、KPI看板、异常升级与跨部门协调；CCC中控台是全厂可观测性的单一入口。
